documentaries.synopsis: A filmmaker forges an unusual friendship with an octopus living in a South African kelp forest, learning as the animal shares the mysteries of her world.

documentaries.title: Planet Earth II
documentaries.description: A documentary series exploring the beauty and diversity of life on Earth, showcasing stunning visuals and captivating storytelling.

documentaries.title: Free Solo
documentaries.description: A film that follows rock climber Alex Honnold as he attempts to climb El Capitan without any ropes or safety gear.
